name: memoir
description: Git-versioned, taxonomy-structured long-term memory with branch/commit/blame provenance.
long_description: Memoir gives the assistant a versioned memory store: every fact is committed (inspect with memoir_commits), memory can branch and check out (memoir_branches / memoir_checkout), and recall is fast and LLM-free. One store can be shared across every MCP host.

tools.name: memoir_summarize
tools.description: List stored paths (histogram) — step 1 of caller-driven recall.

tools.name: memoir_get
tools.description: Fetch memories at exact paths — step 2 of caller-driven recall.

tools.name: memoir_recall
tools.description: One-shot recall shortcut (lexical default; single/tiered LLM modes).

tools.name: memoir_remember
tools.description: Store a fact, auto-classified into a semantic path.

store.title: Memory store path
store.description: Where memoir keeps its versioned store (created automatically).
